summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of tic-tac-toe game completed. All core features working correctly including Joti One font implementation, game mechanics, localStorage persistence, and UI functionality.
passed_tests: Settings page displays with Joti One font for GAME SETTINGS title
Game mode selection (Two Players / vs AI) works correctly
Player name input fields function properly
Player O input correctly disabled in vs AI mode
Max rounds input field accepts and validates input
Save button navigates to game board successfully
Game board displays with Tic-Tac-Toe title in Joti One font
Score board shows player scores and rounds left accurately
Cell clicking places O and X alternately with O starting first
Win detection works and increments score for winner
RESTART GAME button resets scores, board, and rounds
RESET BOARD button clears current board state
SETTINGS button returns to settings page
localStorage persistence works - settings and scores persist after page refresh
Custom player names work and persist correctly
success_percentage: frontend: 90% - All core features tested and working. Minor browser session issues prevented complete AI mode testing.
